The equivalent USD value of the campaign pool of 1,000,000 O3 Tokens is indicative, based on the market price as of January 10, 2025. Please be aware that the market price of O3 Token may differ on the claim date.

Citizens or residents of the USA, UK, and Canada are not eligible to participate in the campaign.
